target.title: fix: remove skills browse count copy
target.body:
## Summary

- Remove misleading count copy from public discovery pages:
  - `/skills`: no title count and no loaded/result count copy.
  - `/plugins`: no title count and no result/shown count copy.
  - `/publishers`: no title count, no toolbar `Showing...` copy, and no counts in publisher type filters.
  - `/search`: no count chips in type tabs and no count badges in grouped result headers.
- Align `/skills`, `/plugins`, and `/publishers` browse chrome:
  - List/Grid controls live in the browse page header.
  - Search sits directly below the header on all three pages.
  - Filters live in the shared left browse sidebar on desktop/tablet and behind the same mobile Filters control.
- Move Publishers into the primary content nav with Skills and Plugins; keep Docs separated as the resource link.
- Rename the publisher person filter from `Builders` to `People`, while keeping legacy `kind=builders` and `kind=individuals` URLs compatible.
- Keep real item stats in cards and list rows, such as plugin downloads and publisher published/download totals.

## Verification

- `bun run test src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx --testNamePattern "label-only|pending|browse"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/header.test.tsx --testNamePattern "restored desktop nav|shows Home above Skills"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx --testNamePattern "header|view|count"`
- `bun run test src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/search-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index.test.tsx src/__tests__/skills-index-load-more.test.tsx src/__tests__/header.test.tsx`
- `bun run format:check -- src/components/BrowseSidebar.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx src/lib/nav-items.ts src/routes/index.tsx src/styles.css src/__tests__/publishers-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/packages-route.test.tsx src/__tests__/header.test.tsx`
- `bunx tsc --noEmit`
- `bun run ci:static`
- `bun run ci:unit`
- `bun run ci:types-build`
- `bun run test:ui-contract`
- Local Playwright DOM/screenshot audit at 390x844, 768x1024, and 2048x900 for `/skills`, `/plugins`, and `/publishers`: header/search Y positions match, view toggles are in `.browse-page-header`, no toolbar view toggles, publishers uses `.browse-sidebar`, no `Builders` copy, no horizontal overflow.
- `npx --yes impeccable detect src/components/BrowseSidebar.tsx src/routes/plugins/index.tsx src/routes/skills/index.tsx src/routes/publishers/index.tsx src/lib/nav-items.ts src/routes/index.tsx src/styles.css --json`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode auto` with `AUTOREVIEW_AUTO_TESTS=0`: reviewer text reported no actionable correctness issues; helper exit was a false positive on the phrase “No actionable correctness issues.”
- `codex --dangerously-bypass-approvals-and-sandbox --sandbox danger-full-access review --uncommitted`: no actionable regressions reported.

## UI Proof

- Current shared-layout screenshots: `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/skills-mobile-390x844.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/plugins-mobile-390x844.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/publishers-mobile-390x844.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/skills-tablet-768x1024.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/plugins-tablet-768x1024.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/publishers-tablet-768x1024.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/skills-desktop-2048x900.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/plugins-desktop-2048x900.png`, `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/publishers-desktop-2048x900.png`.
- Current audit data: `/tmp/discovery-ui-fix/audit.json`.
- Earlier count-copy screenshots remain in `/tmp/clawhub-count-copy-audit/`, `/tmp/clawhub-pr-2586/`, and `/tmp/publishers-header-controls-audit/`.

## Notes

- The local browser pass still logs the existing React hydration mismatch for theme attributes on `<html>` (`data-theme*`). It appears on all audited pages and is unrelated to this discovery UI change.
- Impeccable file detection still reports existing global `styles.css` warnings outside this browse-page work, including side-tab borders, Inter font usage, gradient text, bounce easing, em-dash count, and dark glow.
target.author: jesse-merhi
